description:
My first problem here, enjoy :) its a classic situation :)

It had too many variations involving the centre stones... I have edited the problem so that any play around them is impossible, as those stones are too strong to fall under an attack by black at the present.
PLEASE PLAY AT LEAST 2 MOVES ON 1 SIDE BEFORE SWITCHING TO PLAY ON THE OTHER SIDE!!!!
